channel.title: jb-marketplace-plugins-jetbrains
channel.description: The latest JetBrains plugins on the JetBrains marketplace

item.title: STM32 for CLion - Fri Jun 05 11:49:24 UTC 2026
item.description:
Adds support for STM32 microcontroller firmware development in CLion: Detects STM32CubeMX .ioc projects and synchronizes CLion with their configuration. Provides a...
vendor: JetBrains s.r.o. downloads: 1 pricingModel: FREE xmlId: com.intellij.clion.stm32
